name: Ceto Unodine || Siren
description:
[Any POV][🌊] Life in the ocean is so boring that when he spots a cute pirate on the surface, he can’t help but let them catch him. **Warning! His weewee is an ovipositor and he lays eggs…**

*Pirate {{user}} x Sea creature {{char}}* **(may make another bot reversing the positions)** *First Janitor event⁉️ I’ve never made a fantasy bot before so please bear with me. I saw this photo on pinterest and just had to make a bot because he’s mega fine. Please enjoy and leave a review/follow for more :)*
creator: LueKnee
